overall.description: A bus simulator game showing a first-person view from the driver's seat during a heavy rainstorm. The bus travels along wet city streets, stops to pick up passengers at a bus stop, waits at a traffic light, and makes a left turn onto a narrower street with construction barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city avenue with tree-lined sidewalks

events.description: passing a blue truck on the left side of the road
slowing down to approach the bus stop ahead

agents.ego_description: driving the bus along a wet multi-lane avenue with windshield wipers active, maintaining steady speed through moderate rain

notable_agents.action: blue truck driving in the left lane, overtaking the bus

entered.detail: detailed driver control panel with multiple screens and gauges visible throughout the cabin
active wipers clearing heavy rain from the front windshield
row of green leafy trees lining the left side of the avenue
multi-story residential buildings with modern facades along the right sidewalk
line of parked vehicles along the right curb including sedans and vans

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a wide, rain-soaked city avenue with windshield wipers sweeping across the glass. Trees line the left side while apartment buildings and parked cars occupy the right. A blue truck passes on the left as the bus maintains a steady course through the moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop shelter with waiting passengers

events.description: coming to a complete stop at the designated bus stop
bus doors opening to allow passenger boarding
doors closing and bus beginning to pull away from the stop

agents.ego_description: pulling up to the bus stop, opening doors to let passengers board, waiting while they enter, then closing doors and departing

notable_agents.action: woman in black tank top boarding the bus through the front door
older person with shopping bag boarding after the first passenger

entered.detail: glass and metal shelter structure protecting waiting passengers from rain
bright yellow ticket or snack machine visible behind the bus stop
tall signpost with route information and bus symbol

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls up to a stop where passengers wait under a glass shelter. The doors open and two passengers board—first a woman in a black top, followed by an older person. After they board, the doors close and the bus prepares to rejoin traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection approach with traffic control

events.description: approaching a major intersection with crosswalk markings visible
stopping at red traffic light at the intersection
waiting at the red light while cross traffic moves through the intersection

agents.ego_description: driving along the avenue, slowing down and stopping at a red traffic light at a major intersection, waiting for the signal to change

notable_agents.action: white car waiting at the intersection ahead of the bus

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal showing red light for the bus direction
white zebra stripes painted on the asphalt at the pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: After leaving the bus stop, the bus continues down the wet avenue approaching a major intersection. The driver slows and stops at a red traffic light, waiting behind a white car while rain continues to fall and windshield wipers maintain visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrower city street with construction barriers

events.description: traffic light turns green, proceeding through the intersection
executing a left turn at the intersection onto a narrower street
entering a narrower street lined with construction barriers and different building architecture

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the green light, making a left turn onto a narrower street, and continuing past construction barriers

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers lining the right side of the narrow street
taller urban buildings with stone facades closer to the road on the narrower avenue

segments.scene_description: The light turns green and the bus moves through the intersection, making a left turn onto a narrower street. The environment changes to a more enclosed urban canyon with construction barriers on the right and taller buildings closer to the road, while the rain continues to fall steadily.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-soaked city avenue before turning into a confined urban construction zone. It begins with the bus driving along a wide boulevard lined with trees and apartment buildings, the windshield wipers sweeping steadily as a blue truck passes on the left. As the bus pulls over to a glass shelter, the camera remains steady while a woman in a black top and an older passenger board before the doors close and the vehicle rejoins the flow of traffic. The scene then progresses toward a major intersection where the bus slows to a halt behind a white car at a red light under the persistent rain. Finally, the light turns green and the bus makes a left turn, shifting from the open avenue into a narrower street characterized by towering buildings and orange construction barriers.
